text.title: Quality Attributes Framework Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (stakeholders, goals, SLIs, compliance)?

text.example: Backlog elicited 18 scenarios across 6 categories. ISO check: Compliance missing — added 2 scenarios. Utility tree shifted 5 to high-priority. SLI/SLO doc adds 5 SLOs with dashboards. Trade-off matrix: perf vs cost ('cache miss tolerable up to 5%'), security vs usability ('MFA required for admin only'). Spec published.
